name: Lumen Analytics — FY2025 Revenue Review
based_on: A Series B SaaS company's annual board-deck revenue review rendered as an interactive web page — the kind of ARR/MRR breakdown ChartMogul, Mosaic, or a VP of Finance assembles for the board (analytics SaaS at ~$14M ARR, 112% net revenue retention).
summary: An internal end-of-year revenue analysis for a SaaS company: an executive KPI strip, an ARR bridge waterfall, MRR movement, retention cohorts, and segment breakdowns, all interactive.
sections: Executive summary strip (ARR, Net Revenue Retention, gross logo churn, ACV, CAC payback months)
ARR bridge / waterfall chart: starting ARR + new + expansion − contraction − churned = ending ARR
MRR movement bar chart by month (new vs expansion vs contraction vs churned)
Cohort retention heatmap (signup month vs months-since-signup)
Revenue by plan tier (Starter / Growth / Enterprise) and by segment (SMB / Mid-Market / Enterprise)
Churn analysis with top stated churn reasons and a 'logos at risk' table
Next-year forecast with a base / bull / bear scenario toggle
setup_questions: What's your company name and what does the product do?
What's your current ARR (or MRR) and net revenue retention, roughly?
What plan tiers and customer segments do you sell to?
What fiscal period should this cover (e.g. calendar 2025, FY ending June)?
photo_terms: abstract financial chart blue gradient background
professional headshot woman finance executive neutral
minimal data dashboard ui dark mode
